	3.	Timing: Recognition must occur before May 29, 2026, German time.

question: Will I succeed in my goal of posting an experiment proposal every Friday for the next 10 weeks?
textDescription:
I run an independent scientific research service called Cosimo Research. Last Friday, I published an introduction to Cosimo's three main research programs addressing areas that tend to lack scientific evidence: Biohacking Science, Attraction Science, and Cultural Science.

 

Over the coming weeks, I plan to share detailed proposals for studies in each of these categories. Each proposal will include the context, why existing research is limited, why the study question matters, and an outline of the study design.

I tend to consistently underestimate the amount of time my work will take. I ended up publishing the intro post a week after I intended because I wanted to make the images good (and I went on a weekend trip). However, I am highly determined to complete this. I use time blocking for task management and it works well for me. I have no vacations planned in the next 10 weeks. Some of the ideas are already quite fleshed out and I have partial drafts for about half of them.

YES if I post an new experiment proposal on at least 9 of these 10 dates: March 20, March 27, April 3, April 10, April 17, April 24, May 1, May 8, May 15, May 22.
